body:
## ALSAA-11 planning complete — ADO Feature ladder mirror plan v1.0.0-draft

**Disposition:** moving to `in_review` for CEO/board approval before ADO mutations.

### Deliverables

1. **Execution plan:** `docs/plans/nextsteps-ado-feature-ladder-plan.md`
2. **Routing matrix (starter):** `docs/ado-routing-matrix.md` — NextSteps → Lab AI Tools routing, Feature ladder 0.1.0–0.7.0, WIQL snippets

### Summary

| Layer | Count | Detail |
|-------|-------|--------|
| **Features** | 7 | `NextSteps Release 0.1.0` … `0.7.0` with Friday TargetDates (2026-05-30 → 2026-07-11) |
| **User Stories** | 7 | Mirror ALSAA-12…18 under parent Features |
| **ADO project** | Lab AI Tools | Area `Lab AI Tools\NextSteps`; iteration `Sprint N` |
| **Delivery plan** | Mimir plan (default) | Filter by NextSteps area; CEO can opt for dedicated plan |

### Paperclip → Feature map

| Paperclip | Semver | Feature theme |
|-----------|--------|---------------|
| ALSAA-12 | 0.1.0 | MERN Foundation (done) |
| ALSAA-13 | 0.2.0 | Maverick Mission HQ (blocked) |
| ALSAA-14 | 0.3.0 | Trainer Pulse (in_progress) |
| ALSAA-15 | 0.4.0 | L&D Intelligence (done) |
| ALSAA-16 | 0.5.0 | Session Intelligence (in_progress) |
| ALSAA-17 | 0.6.0 | Deployment Bridge (in_progress) |
| ALSAA-18 | 0.7.0 | Gamification (done) |

### Next action (post-approval)

SM executes §6 of the plan: create Features + User Stories in ADO, delivery plan cards, Wiki changelog entry, read-back table on this issue. **No ADO ids yet** — planning heartbeat only per work mode.

**Reviewer:** Vesper / board via `request_confirmation` below.
